hero_subtitle: SFTY enables VASPs to configure routing, escalation and approval rules across compliance workflows while maintaining audit-ready traceability and governance controls.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance rules become hard to manage
problem_description: Enterprise compliance teams struggle to configure and maintain consistent rules for routing, risk thresholds, escalation and approval across multiple providers. This fragmentation slows operational response and weakens audit readiness during regulatory reviews and bank due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes rule configuration, routing, thresholds, escalation and approvals from multiple providers into one auditable, traceable workflow so compliance teams can maintain consistent control and respond faster.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to rule configuration
workflow_description: SFTY monitors regulatory changes and guides the structured update of internal compliance rules with routing, escalation and approval workflows for audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented rules. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects compliance rules, alerts, cases and evidence into a single control layer that supports rule configuration, escalation and audit preparedness for enterprises.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing enterprise-grade compliance rules with controlled escalation, audit-ready evidence and deployment governance for clearer operational trust and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for enterprise compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a provider-neutral compliance layer for enterprise teams, connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support compliance rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies configurable rules to route alerts, set thresholds, manage escalation and approval workflows, enabling consistent and auditable compliance decision processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support review readiness, audit processes and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into a connected compliance operating system.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers; it connects their outputs and structures them into operational compliance workflows and audit-ready records.
final_title: Configure compliance rules for routing and escalation
final_description: Review how SFTY supports phased rule setup, approval workflows and audit-ready traceability for institutional compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
